plugins.name: devolens
plugins.description: Devolens (formerly Cryptolens) licensing skills for .NET, Java, Python, and cross-SDK shared rules. Installs twelve skills in one bundle: cryptolens-sdk-common, cryptolens-dotnet, cryptolens-java, cryptolens-python, license-offline, license-key-verification, license-floating, license-trials, license-feature-gates, license-subscriptions, license-key-generation, license-payment-automation.
